summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aria Dashboard v2.0. Backend APIs mostly functional (93.8% success rate), but critical frontend session management issues prevent full dashboard functionality.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Timeout when checking external service health
flaky_endpoints.impact: Health monitoring for external services (CaseDesk, ForgePilot, Unraid) fails

critical_bugs.issue: User session is lost after successful login, redirecting back to login page
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to dashboard features, navigation, and services

critical_bugs.issue: Services (CaseDesk, ForgePilot, Unraid) not displaying on dashboard
critical_bugs.impact: Core functionality unavailable - users cannot access configured services

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links not accessible due to session loss
Chat functionality not accessible due to session management

integration_issues.issue: Successful login followed by immediate session loss
integration_issues.symptoms: User redirected back to login page after brief dashboard view

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend session management - users are being logged out immediately after successful login. This prevents access to all dashboard features including services, navigation, and chat. Also investigate why services are not displaying on the dashboard.
